subject: Update: EIC all 5 phases complete + agentdb binary needs chromabook deploy

body.summary: Correction to Turn 1 deployment note: ALL five EIC implementation phases now complete (not just phase 1). agentdb binary rebuilt with disclose + disclose-summary subcommands. Needs SCP to chromabook.
completed_since_turn_1: EIC Phase 2: agentdb disclose subcommand (validates category, confidence, content)
EIC Phase 3: agentdb disclose-summary (budget reset integration)
EIC Phase 4: autonomous-sync orientation payload includes EIC section
EIC Phase 5: orientation-payload.py shows disclosure counts since audit
Bug fix: orientation-payload.py autonomy_budget_status() now queries state.local.db (DB split fix)
deployment_needed: SCP agentdb-linux-amd64 to chromabook (all 4 repos) — new binary includes disclose + disclose-summary
Run agentdb bootstrap on chromabook to apply schema v24 to state.local.db

claims.claim: All 5 EIC phases tested locally — INSERT succeeds, DELETE blocked, UPDATE blocked, summary displays correctly, orientation payload includes EIC section
